headline: EPAM (EPAM) Stock Looks Cheap Even After A 85% Fall
summary: EPAM Systems stock has had a difficult run over the last five years, yet the valuation checks currently lean cheap, which sets up a clear tension between past share price performance and what the market multiples suggest today. Over five years, EPAM Systems has declined 84.7%, which means long term holders have seen most of their capital eroded even before considering any valuation upside now implied by the market. Recent recognition for EPAM Systems in AI focused partnerships with...
